address.value: Khao Mai Kaew, Bang Lamung, Chonburi 20150

prose.overview: Pattaya Country Club & Resort is an 18-hole, par-72 course in Khao Mai Kaew, Bang Lamung, Chonburi, opened in 1993 and positioned as one of the closest courses to central Pattaya city. The property spans over 2,000 rai of gently rolling hills and underwent an extensive renovation in 2014 that refreshed the layout and facilities. At approximately 2,000 THB for a round, it sits in the mid-range tier for Pattaya-area pricing, accessible to visitors who want a solid resort round without paying the premium rates of the region's top facilities. The course reopened after a period of closure prior to the renovation and has built a following among Pattaya-based golfers who value its proximity and consistent conditions.
prose.layout_and_experience: The 18-hole layout at Pattaya Country Club plays to 7,054 yards at par 72 across undulating terrain set among hills. The rolling topography creates natural variation between holes — some featuring elevated tees and downhill approaches, others playing across valley floors where wind direction becomes a factor. The 2014 renovation refreshed bunker placement, green surfaces, and course infrastructure, bringing the overall quality up to a standard consistent with the Pattaya region's competitive golf market. The layout suits a range of handicaps, with enough challenge to engage better players while remaining manageable for mid-handicappers who commit to hitting fairways. The resort setting means facilities including a clubhouse and changing rooms are maintained to a reasonable standard.
prose.tips: Pattaya Country Club's proximity to central Pattaya — approximately 25 minutes by car — makes it a practical first or last round of the day on a Pattaya golf trip. The hilly terrain means course knowledge is useful, particularly for reading green slopes and judging distances on elevated approaches. Weekend tee sheets fill earlier than weekdays, so advance booking is worthwhile. The mid-range pricing makes it a good option for golfers looking to fit multiple rounds into a visit without committing tournament-level green fees every day. Confirm current phone and booking options through golf agents as the club's own booking infrastructure is limited online.
prose.location_and_access: Pattaya Country Club & Resort is located approximately 145km southeast of central Bangkok in Khao Mai Kaew, Bang Lamung, Chonburi. The drive from Bangkok takes around 110 minutes via the Bang Na–Trat Expressway (Highway 7). The course is approximately 25 minutes by car from central Pattaya, making it the most conveniently located option for golfers based in Pattaya city. Grab and pre-arranged golf transfers from Pattaya hotels are the standard transport options.
prose.rental_cta_context: Heading out to Pattaya Country Club for a quick round near Pattaya city? Rent clubs delivered to your hotel — skip the airport bag hassle entirely.
